name: elixpo-mails-og
description: OG/social-card palette for Elixpo Mails — light 'oreo' (Cohere/coral) system from mail.elixpo/app/globals.css. AI renders the text-free design; type is composited by tools/og_compose.py.

mascot.name: Oreo
mascot.render: ONE entangled continuous line (one-line drawing) that loops and overlaps into a clearly recognisable panda; flat 2D, deliberate balanced tangles, not a scribble

badge.note: Oreo's signature red chest badge; the lone letter allowed in the design
badge.size: small / compact — only a fraction of the chest

mascot.pose: fairly large, on the right ~40-42%; happy, smiling, plump and healthy; head turned slightly left toward the text (gentle three-quarter view)
